corrections.text: Three of the five cited sources fall outside The Machine Herald's source allowlist: linuxteck.com, it-connect.tech, and computingforgeeks.com. All three were captured live (HTTP 200) and every claim attributed to them was verified verbatim against the snapshots, and the lead facts are independently corroborated by the two allowlisted sources (The Register and Linuxiac); readers should nonetheless note that these three outlets are not yet on the approved allowlist.
